betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6M1TTY Environment Suit§f

§aMid-game power armor with excellent mobility, radiation protection, and hazard immunity!§f

§bThe M1TTY Environment Suit§f is a mid-game powered armor set. Each piece holds §e100kHE§f charge and charges at §e1kHE/t§f. The full set provides §bSpeed§f and §bJump Boost§f bonuses along with §e89.99%§f radiation reduction.

§6Crafting§f (per piece):
§b• Helmet§f: 4 Titanium Plate + Glass Pane + Microchip + 3 Rubber
§b• Chestplate§f: 5 Titanium Plate + Cast Titanium Plate + 3 Rubber
§b• Leggings§f: 4 Titanium Plate + Cast Titanium Plate + 2 Rubber
§b• Boots§f: 2 Titanium Plate + 2 Rubber

§6Protections§f:
§b• Airborne Particles§f | §b• Particulates§f
§b• Chemical Gas§f | §b• Bacteria/Aerosols§f
§b• Corrosive Fumes§f | §b• Carbon Monoxide§f
§b• Bright Lights§f | §b• Eye Irritants§f
§b• Radiation§f: 1.0 resistance (89.99% reduction)

§6Bonuses§f:
§b• High mobility§f on ground and underwater
§b• Underwater§f night vision and propulsion (vectored jetpack-like)
§b• Fire§f: 75% resistance | §b• Fall§f: 75% reduction

§eTip§f: The M1TTY suit is excellent for exploring hazardous environments. Upgrade from basic hazmat gear once you have Titanium production set up!
